name: Task Watchdog
description: Injects failure notifications into parent session when subagents fail or exec processes exit abnormally. Uses idempotencyKey to avoid duplicate notifications with OpenClaw's built-in announce delivery.

subagentNotifyOn.description: Subagent outcomes that trigger a notification injection

execNotifyOnAbnormal.description: Whether to inject notification on exec abnormal exit (non-zero exit code, timeout, OOM)

injectionTtlMs.description: TTL for next-turn injection messages (default 5 minutes)

timerPatrol.description: Enable gateway_start timer-based patrol (default true). When enabled, heartbeat patrol is skipped.

timerPatrolIntervalMs.description: Timer patrol interval in milliseconds (default 2 minutes)

staleThresholdMs.description: How long a running task is considered stale (default 30 minutes)
